visible_response:
Nay, how much better it is to wipe your nose than to find fault.
What do you think that Hercules would have been if there had not been such a lion, and hydra, and stag, and boar, and certain unjust and bestial men, whom Hercules used to drive away and clear out?
And what would he have been doing if there had been nothing of the kind?
Is it not plain that he would have wrapped himself up and have slept?
